001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Insert;
006import androidx.room.Query;
007import androidx.room.Update;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Egg;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchEggAggregate;
010import java.util.List;
011
012/**
013 * Room Data Access Object (DAO) for Egg entity operations.
014 */
015@Dao
016public interface EggDao {
017
018  /**
019   * Inserts a single egg into the database.
020   *
021   * @param egg the egg to insert
022   * @return the generated egg ID
023   */
024  @Insert
025  long insert(Egg egg);
026
027  /**
028   * Inserts multiple eggs into the database.
029   *
030   * @param eggs the list of eggs to insert
031   * @return a list of generated egg IDs
032   */
033  @Insert
034  List<Long> insertAll(List<Egg> eggs);
035
036  /**
037   * Updates an existing egg in the database.
038   *
039   * @param egg the egg to update
040   */
041  @Update
042  void update(Egg egg);
043
044  /**
045   * Updates multiple existing eggs in the database.
046   *
047   * @param eggs the list of eggs to update
048   */
049  @Update
050  void update(List<Egg> eggs);
051
052  /**
053   * Retrieves all eggs for a specific egg group as LiveData.
054   *
055   * @param eggGroupId the ID of the egg group
056   * @return a LiveData list of eggs in the specified group
057   */
058  @Query("SELECT * FROM egg WHERE egg_group_id = :eggGroupId")
059  LiveData<List<Egg>> selectByEggGroup(long eggGroupId);
060
061  /**
062   * Fetches all eggs for a specific egg group (non-LiveData).
063   *
064   * @param eggGroupId the ID of the egg group
065   * @return a list of eggs in the specified group, ordered by egg number
066   */
067  @Query("SELECT * FROM egg WHERE egg_group_id = :eggGroupId ORDER BY egg_number ASC")
068  List<Egg> fetchByEggGroup(long eggGroupId);
069
070  /**
071   * Retrieves a specific egg by ID as LiveData.
072   *
073   * @param eggId the ID of the egg to retrieve
074   * @return a LiveData containing the egg with the specified ID
075   */
076  @Query("SELECT * FROM egg WHERE egg_id = :eggId")
077  LiveData<Egg> select(long eggId);
078
079  /**
080   * Retrieves viability statistics aggregated by batch.
081   *
082   * @return a LiveData list of BatchEggAggregate objects containing viability counts per batch
083   */
084  @Query(
085      "SELECT e.egg_group_id AS eggGroupId, " +
086          "       eg.batch_id    AS batchId, " +
087          "       COUNT(*)       AS totalCount, " +
088          "       SUM(CASE WHEN e.hatch_status = 'VIABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS viableCount " +
089          "FROM egg e " +
090          "JOIN egg_group eg ON e.egg_group_id = eg.egg_group_id " +
091          "GROUP BY eg.batch_id"
092  )
093  LiveData<List<BatchEggAggregate>> selectViabilityPerBatch();
094}
